channel.title: Orthodox Christian Sermons: Holy Week:Holy Saturday
channel.description: Audio Orthodox Christian Sermons: Holy Week:Holy Saturday

item.title: Holy Saturday, The resurrection fulfils every need., The Sunamite woman, Abraham and Ezekiel proclaim the resurrection, 2011-04-23
item.description: :Holy Saturday. We proclaim the resurrection every week in the scriptures read in matins on Sunday. The resurrection is also declared in a hidden way in the OT. On this Holy Saturday, after we have read the Gospel of Matthew in front of the tomb which proclaims the resurrection, let us see how three of the readings we have recently read from the OT proclaim it in a mystical and beautiful way, with examples including Abraham, Ezekiel, and the Sunamite woman.
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Holy Saturday. We proclaim the resurrection every week in the scriptures read in matins on Sunday. The resurrection is also declared in a hidden way in the OT. On this Holy Saturday, after we have read the Gospel of Matthew in front of the tomb which proclaims the resurrection, let us see how three of the readings we have recently read from the OT proclaim it in a mystical and beautiful way, with examples including Abraham, Ezekiel, and the Sunamite woman.

item.title: Holy Saturday, Holy Saturday Matins, 2013-05-04
item.description: :Holy Saturday. A homily by Saint Epiphanius of Cyprus on the burial of the Divine Body of Our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, on Joseph of Arimathea, and on the descent of the Lord into Hades which, after His saving Passion, wonderously ensued on the Holy and great SaturdayA homily on the burial of the Divine Body of Our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, on Joseph of Arimathea, and on the descent of the Lord into Hades which, after His saving Passion, wondrously ensued on the Holy and great Saturday. Read from the Lamentations of Matins, pub by Holy Transfiguration Monastery, Boston MA
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Holy Saturday. A homily by Saint Epiphanius of Cyprus on the burial of the Divine Body of Our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, on Joseph of Arimathea, and on the descent of the Lord into Hades which, after His saving Passion, wonderously ensued on the Holy and great SaturdayA homily on the burial of the Divine Body of Our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, on Joseph of Arimathea, and on the descent of the Lord into Hades which, after His saving Passion, wondrously ensued on the Holy and great Saturday. Read from the Lamentations of Matins, pub by Holy Transfiguration Monastery, Boston MA
